notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Cooper Pratt to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Spencer Steer out at 2nd. JJ Bleday out at 1st.
